<!-- Open PRs against `main`. `dev` is the Cold Code Labs preview lane — see CONTRIBUTING.md -->

**What & why**
What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link the issue it addresses.

**How verified**
How did you test this? (typecheck, the forge loop, screenshots for UI.)

**Checklist**
- [ ] Focused — one logical change
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] Docs (README / ARCHITECTURE) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values in the diff
